---
title: "Getting Started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(uccdf)
```

# Overview

`uccdf` provides a compact consensus clustering workflow for tabular data
frames. The package keeps the API small and avoids bundled large datasets.

# First run

```{r}
fit <- fit_uccdf(iris, candidate_k = 2:4, n_resamples = 20, seed = 42)
fit
select_k(fit)
head(augment(fit))
```

```{r}
plot_embedding(fit, main = "iris latent embedding")
plot_consensus_heatmap(fit, main = "iris consensus heatmap")
```

# Output

The main outputs are:

- the selected `K`
- the row-level assignments
- the consensus-derived confidence values
